settings.title: Creatine+
settings.subtitle: MORNING BLEND
settings.directions: Mix 1 scoop with 8-12 oz of water or your favorite beverage each morning.
settings.ingredients: Magnesium (Citrate):150 mg|Creatine Monohydrate:5.25 g|Glycine:5 g|Inulin:4 g|Taurine:3.05 g|Glucosamine Hydrochloride:750 mg|L-Ergothioneine:5 mg
settings.other_ingredients: Other Ingredients (flavored only): Allulose, Natural Flavours, Citric Acid, Stevia Extract (Reb A)
settings.benefits: Supports muscle strength and cognitive function|Enhances cellular energy production|Promotes healthy inflammatory response|Supports gut health with prebiotic fiber|Aids in muscle recovery and performance

settings.title: Protect+
settings.subtitle: MORNING SOFTGELS
settings.directions: Take 1 softgel each morning with food.
settings.ingredients: Coenzyme Q10:200 mg|Astaxanthin:6 mg|Lutein:10 mg|Zeaxanthin:2 mg
settings.other_ingredients: Other Ingredients: Sunflower Seed Oil, Vegan Gelatin, Glycerin, Purified Water, Annatto Extract (for color), Sunflower Lecithin, Glyceryl Monostearate
settings.benefits: Powerful antioxidant protection for cells|Supports cardiovascular and heart health|Protects eye health and visual function|Promotes healthy skin and reduces UV damage|Supports mitochondrial energy production

settings.title: RECOVERY+
settings.subtitle: EVENING CAPSULES
settings.directions: Take 2 capsules each evening, preferably 30 minutes before bed.
settings.ingredients: Glucosamine Hydrochloride:750 mg|L-Theanine:200 mg|Lithium (as Lithium Orotate):400 mcg
settings.other_ingredients: Other Ingredients: Microcrystalline Cellulose and Hypromellose (capsules), Magnesium Stearate (vegan source)
settings.benefits: Supports joint health and mobility|Promotes relaxation and quality sleep|May support cognitive function and neuroprotection|Helps reduce stress and anxiety|Supports healthy aging at the cellular level

settings.heading: Consistent 5-Star Reviews
settings.description: The new foundation of healthspan starts here.

settings.heading: 5 Reasons You Should Upgrade Your Supplement Stack Today

settings.text: The wellness industry is loud, contradictory, and exhausting. Who do you listen to? What actually works? At Coastline, we’ve cut through the noise. Our team of clinical researchers has curated a foundational stack of 13 ingredients—nothing speculative, no fads, no fluff, no filler. We do the heavy lifting of curation so you can optimize your health with total confidence.

settings.liquid:
★★★★★

"The 13 ingredients chosen for Coastline are the most scientifically supported, and clinically validated supplements yet to be discovered."

Greg Potter, PhD, MSc Sleep & Circadian Health Researcher
★★★★★

"Coastline is what happens when you combine scientific rigor with real-world clinical understanding."

★★★★★

★★★★★

"Coastline represents a new era of precision supplementation — one rooted in clarity, science, and consistency."

Dr. Chris Pollock, M.D. Precision Supplementation Expert

settings.heading: Creatine Monohydrate- 5.25 g
settings.text: Creatine is a powerhouse for both body and brain. It facilitates ATP production to enhance cellular energy, supporting muscle strength, power, and exercise recovery. Beyond physical performance, it is a vital neuroprotector that supports cognitive function, memory resilience, and mood stability, especially during times of mental or physical stress.

settings.heading: L-Ergothioneine - 5 mg
settings.text: Often called the "longevity vitamin," Ergothioneine is a rare amino acid and powerful antioxidant that accumulates in tissues prone to high oxidative stress. It supports mitochondrial health, protects DNA from damage, and promotes cognitive resilience. It acts as a cellular shield, helping to maintain long-term systemic health and vitality.

settings.heading: CoEnzyme Q10 - 200 mg
settings.text: CoQ10 is an essential antioxidant found in every cell, primarily concentrated in the mitochondria. It plays a critical role in cellular energy production and cardiovascular health. By neutralizing free radicals, it protects cells from oxidative damage, supports healthy blood pressure levels, and promotes overall heart and vascular resilience.

settings.heading: Taurine - 3.05 g
settings.text: Taurine is a sulfur-containing amino acid that supports a wide range of metabolic functions. It is essential for heart health, bile salt production for digestion, and electrolyte balance within cells. It also acts as a cytoprotective agent, supporting muscle performance, mood stability, and the healthy function of the central nervous system.

settings.heading: Glucosamine - 1500 mg
settings.text: Glucosamine is a fundamental building block for cartilage and joint tissue. Included in both the morning and evening blends, it supports long-term joint mobility, flexibility, and daily comfort. By aiding in the maintenance of healthy connective tissues, it helps protect the skeletal system against the wear and tear of aging.

settings.heading: Inulin (From Chickory) - 4 g
settings.text: Inulin is a prebiotic soluble fiber derived from chicory root that serves as "superfood" for beneficial gut bacteria. It supports digestive harmony and a healthy microbiome while slowing digestion to prevent blood sugar spikes. This promotes steady energy levels and increases satiety, helping to curb cravings throughout the day.

settings.heading: Magnesium Citrate - 150 mg
settings.text: Magnesium is a vital mineral involved in over 300 enzymatic reactions. In its citrate form, it is highly bioavailable, supporting muscle relaxation, nerve function, and bone density. It plays a key role in energy metabolism and helps regulate the nervous system to promote a sense of calm and physical recovery.

settings.heading: Astaxanthin - 6 mg
settings.text: Known as one of nature’s most potent antioxidants, Astaxanthin provides comprehensive cellular protection. It supports skin health by improving hydration and texture while increasing resistance to UV damage. Additionally, it crosses the blood-brain and blood-retina barriers to support cognitive health, visual function, and a healthy systemic inflammatory response.

settings.heading: Glycine - 5 g
settings.text: Glycine is a versatile amino acid that supports multiple longevity pathways. It is a key component of collagen for joint and skin health and serves as a precursor to glutathione, the body’s master antioxidant. In the evening, it helps lower core body temperature to promote deeper, more restorative sleep quality.

settings.heading: L-Theanine - 200 mg
settings.text: Primarily found in tea leaves, L-Theanine is an amino acid that promotes relaxation without drowsiness. By facilitating the production of calming brain chemicals, it helps reduce stress and anxiety. When taken in the evening, it improves sleep quality, ensuring you wake up feeling refreshed, mentally sharp, and balanced.

settings.heading: Lutein 10 mg & Zeaxanthin 2 mg
settings.text: These powerful carotenoid antioxidants work in tandem to protect your eyes and brain. Concentrated in the macula, they act as internal "sunglasses" by filtering harmful blue light and neutralizing oxidative stress. Beyond supporting long-term visual clarity and contrast, this duo is clinically linked to improved skin health and sharper cognitive performance.

settings.heading: Lithium Orotate - 400 mcg
settings.text: Included in micro-dose form, Lithium Orotate supports neuroprotection and cognitive longevity. It helps regulate mood and emotional stability while promoting the health of gray matter in the brain. At these supplemental levels, it assists in managing the body’s stress response and supports healthy aging at a cellular level.
Most supplements fixate on a single niche; Coastline is designed for the whole human.

settings.liquid:

settings.heading: 3. A Simple Routine That's Easy To Stick With

settings.text: Optimizing your health shouldn’t feel like a part-time job. Forget the cupboard full of rattling bottles and the stress of managing ten different subscriptions. Coastline streamlines your entire routine into one elegant system: a Morning Blend drink paired with one SoftGel, and two Evening Capsules at night. It’s total-body optimization in under 60 seconds a day.

settings.text: Why choose between feeling good now and staying healthy later? Coastline targets both immediate results like energy, clairty, gut health, and sleep. with longer-term benefits of supporting cellular repair, joint integrity, and brain health to ensure your future self is just as capable as you are today. With Coastline you can more easily meet the demands of the day, and you desires for the future.

3rd Party Tested
Science-Backed
Total-Body Support

settings.title: What does “healthspan” mean?
settings.text: Healthspan is the length of time you live with vitality, clarity, and independence — not just lifespan. Coastline is built to support the systems that decline with age: energy metabolism, mood, sleep, inflammation, joints, skin, and cognition. The goal isn’t just to live longer — it’s to live better.

settings.title: Can I pause or cancel my subscription anytime?
settings.text: Yes — totally flexible. You can pause, skip, or cancel your subscription at any time in your account portal. No commitments, just results.

settings.title: How safe are Coastline's ingredients?
settings.text: All ingredients are used at levels shown to be safe and effective in human studies. All products are third-party tested for purity and potency.

settings.title: What kind of results can I expect — and when?
settings.text: Most people feel improvements in sleep, focus, and energy within the first 1–2 weeks. Deeper benefits — like joint support, skin resilience, and gut health — build gradually with consistent daily use. Think long-term investment, not overnight fix.

settings.title: Why isn’t this available on Amazon or in stores?
settings.text: We sell exclusively through our website to maintain full control over quality, freshness, and customer experience. No middlemen, no price games — just direct support from our team to you.

settings.title: What if I miss a day?
settings.text: No problem. Longevity is about consistency, not perfection. Just resume your regular routine the next day — your body will thank you over time.

settings.heading: Have another question?
settings.text: Don't hestitate to contact us

settings.heading: Questions & Answers
